Welcome to Meath Bowling Club

Join our friendly local club for bowls, social events, and community spirit across the seasons.

Latest event

Saturday club open day with friendly matches and refreshments. All welcome to watch and learn.

Meath Bowling Club

Friendly, community-first lawn bowls in Meath. Everyone is welcome, whether you're new or returning.
